title: Adam Sandler Franchise Sequel Heads to Streaming as Cast & Plot Details Revealed

blocks.content: Following last year’s release of the Adam Sandler sequel, Happy Gilmore 2, which reunited fans with one of the actor and comedian’s best characters on Netflix, the Sandman and the streamer are now all set to bring another long-awaited comedy sequel in one of the SNL alum’s most beloved franchises to life.

We've been waiting for 13 years now, but it’s official; Grown Ups 3 is happening, and it’s headed straight to streaming. Officially confirmed back in May, details surrounding the next adventure with Sandler and his group of fellow arrested development friends have been something of a mystery, but a new listing on Production Weekly has revealed which cast members will return, our first hint at plot, and when the sequel will start filming.

Released back in 2010, the first Grown Ups follows Adam Sandler, Kevin James, and Chris Rock as three friends who, after the death of their childhood basketball coach, decide to reunite at the site of a championship celebration years earlier. A sequel, Grown Ups 2, was released in 2013 and finds Sandler’s character moving back to his hometown to be closer to his buddies, but his return causes all manner of chaos.

Both Grown Ups movies were savagely panned by critics, with the first outing landing a score of just 10% on Rotten Tomatoes, with Grown Ups 2 suffering an even worse reaction and landing a score of just 8% on the review aggregator site. However, defying critics as Sandler so often does, the comedy outings have become firm favorites with audiences, with the third outing surely destined to become a massive streaming hit.

The listing confirms that the original cast, including Adam Sandler as Lenny, Kevin James as Eric, Chris Rock as Kurt, David Spade as Marcus, Salma Hayek, as Roxanne, Maya Rudolph as Deanne, Maria Bello as Sally, and Rob Schneider as Rob, will return for Grown Ups 3, with the plot finding the gang heading to Europe to scatter the ashes of a “close friend.”

"The Grown Ups franchise revolves around a set of childhood friends who are brought back together as adults over the course of a summer vacation. The threequel picks up with Lenny (Sandler), Marcus (Spade), Rob (Schneider), Kurt (Rock), Eric (James), and their significant others after the death of a close friend, as they travel to Europe to spread his ashes and prove that they can still be fun – even in their sixties."

It also now been revealed that Grown Ups 3 is scheduled to begin filming next month on July 6, 2026, running for three months and taking Sandler and his crew across New Jersey and Boston before heading to Italy and France. All of which suggests Grown Ups 3 will be ready to finally make its Netflix debut sometime in summer 2027.
